events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man at the counter kept passing things on the counter according to the masked man's command.
events.event_text: From 7.1s to 55.5s, the man at the counter kept passing things on the counter according to the masked man's command.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; After the man at the counter gestured and communicated with the masked man, the masked man suddenly escaped out the door.
events.event_text: From 60.4s to 69.4s, after the man at the counter gestured and communicated with the masked man, the masked man suddenly escaped out the door.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man at the counter walked out of the counter and ran out of the door.
events.event_text: From 70.4s to 75.4s, the man at the counter walked out of the counter and ran out of the door.
